boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CLR-TES-074 exactly matches legal name, country, tax ID, account and monitor-only no-block disposition; STD-TES-074-P permits release on exact match.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 and STD-TES-074-P together close the boundary for exact counterparty match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: FLAG-TES-074 entity mismatch (Belarus LLC vs Germany GmbH) creates no open defect on the payment counterparty.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance and policy both apply before release; no timing or authority gap.

final_answer: Payment release is permitted. CLR-TES-074 supplies exact name, country, tax ID, account and monitor-only disposition matching the vendor. FLAG-TES-074 applies to a non-matching Belarus entity. STD-TES-074-P authorizes release on this closed boundary.
